title: The Wind & The Sun
content:
The Wind and the Sun had a bet,
    The wayfarers' cloak which should get:
    Blew the Wind--the cloak clung:
    Shone the Sun--the cloak flung
    Showed the Sun had the best of it yet.

    True Strength Is Not Bluster
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Wind & The Sun"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
